title: impl_string_newtype! macro: correct full set of cross-type PartialEq impls
description: The macro generates all four symmetry-necessary PartialEq directions (T==str, T==&str, &str==T, String==T, T==String) plus Display, AsRef, Deref. All eight impls were present before the macro; the macro is an exact isomorphic replacement, not a simplification that dropped any impl. A contributor might try to trim 'obvious' impls — verify the full set is still needed before accepting any PR that touches this macro.
close_reason: Decision record — no code change needed
